problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: Combining Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
